ads.ad_copy:
Trying something new just got even more exciting 👀🥳 #MarriottBonvoyPartner

Comment PASSPORT and I’ll DM you the Iink to join in on the fun! 📥

Think of it like a brand passport, but instead of stamps, you earn 2,500 bonus points and a bonus elite night credit for every different @marriottbonvoy brand you try (over 30 different brands!) - meaning the more you mix it up, the more bonus points AND elite night credits you rack up!!

Even within the same city, the earning potential is kind of wild (and easy to earn) - I went to Miami three ways across three stays and have already earned a bonus at each:

🧖‍♀️ a wellness reset at @jwturnberry, 
💻 a work trip at @miamimarriottbiscaynebay, 
🏖️ and a beach getaway at @theshelborne -

same city, three different brands, three bonuses earned 🎉

Register by April 26th and eligible stays count through May 10th!! (Paid stays only!) 🤗

#MarriottBonvoy #travelrewards #traveltips #hotellife Miami hotels
